subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the King, the All-Bountiful, Who hath created man and taught him utterance, and guided him unto the gardens of knowledge and understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الملک المنان الذی خلق الانسان و علمه البیان و هدیته الی ریاض العلم و العرفان
